refunds to the limit of liability of an individual tax account; and

refunds due from credit provisions of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.) enacted before , or enacted by the Taxpayer Relief Act of 1997, or from section 21, 24, 25A, 35, 36, 36A, 36B, 168(k)(4)(F), 53(e), 54B(h), 3131, 3132, 3134, 6428, 6428A, 6428B, 6431, or 7527A of such Code, or due under section 3081(b)(2) of the Housing Assistance Tax Act of 2008.26 U.S.C. 11111January 1, 1978See References in Text note below.1
